firmware.title: Tcard_X6820-H773AB-T-GL-230804V536
firmware.description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: X6820-H773AB-T-GL-230804V536
Optimized Issues:
1.Upgraded the Android version from Android 12 to Android 13.
2.Upgraded the XOS version from XOS 12.0.0 to XOS 13.0.0.
3.Upgraded/added some special features to improve the overall experience, including but not limited to Mobile Cloner, Lightning Multi-Window, Multiple Users, PC Connection, Folax, and Smart Panel.
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit XClub forum (Geekbar) for more information.
